user_prompt: Refund request — process the standard refund flow for a customer within their 14-day window.
actual_output:
Priority: MEDIUM
Category: Billing - Refund Request
Flag: Within 14-day window

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

I’m sorry to hear that OpenClaw wasn't the right fit for your needs right now. I completely understand that you'd like to move forward with a refund.

Since you are within our 14-day money-back guarantee window, I have gone ahead and processed a full refund for your recent charge. You should see those funds return to your original payment method within 3–5 business days, depending on your bank.

Your account access will remain active until the end of your current billing cycle.

If you have a moment, I’d love to hear any feedback you have on what we could improve—we’re always looking to make OpenClaw better for our users.

I’m sorry to see you go, but I’m here if you ever decide to give us another try in the future.

Best,

Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the task as a standard support ticket triage and response drafting exercise, following the guidelines and examples provided in its system prompt.
